about.title: About Me
about.description: Full-Stack Developer with 3 years of enterprise experience delivering scalable CRM systems, cloud migration platforms for global telecom clients including Vodafone, Safaricom, Yettel, and Vodacom Congo. Expert in Java, Spring Boot, React, Angular, Kubernetes, Docker, and GitLab CI/CD.Experienced cross-cultural collaborator who has worked across African, Asian, and European client environments. Currently pursuing MSc in Applied Computer Science at TH Deggendorf, Germany.

skills.title: Core Competencies
skills.description: Backend Development: Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate JPA, REST API Design, GraphQL, JOLT, Microservices Architecture. Frontend Development: React, Angular, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, i18n Localisation, Reactive Forms. DevOps and Cloud: Docker, Kubernetes, OpenShift, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, AWS, Red Hat, CI/CD Pipeline Design. Database and Tools: SQL Server, SSMS, DBeaver, Complex SQL Queries, Bulk Data Migration, Postman, JIRA, Confluence. Security and Auth: Keycloak, RBAC, OAuth2, Role-Based Access Control, SSO, Scope-Based Permissions. Methodologies: Agile, Scrum, Sprint Planning, Code Review, TDD, UAT, Technical Documentation, Stakeholder Management. Cross-Cultural Skills: International Stakeholder Management, Multi-timezone Collaboration, Multicultural Team Leadership, Intercultural Communication.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about my work, experience, and how we can collaborate together.

q1.question: Who are you and what do you specialize in?
q1.answer: I'm a Backend/Full-Stack Developer with 3 years of enterprise experience specializing in Java, Spring Boot, React, Angular, and cloud technologies. I focus on building scalable CRM systems, cloud migration platforms, and test automation tools for global telecom clients.

q2.question: What technologies do you work with?
q2.answer: I work with Java, Spring Boot, Hibernate JPA, React, Angular, TypeScript, Kubernetes, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, AWS, Keycloak, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL. I have extensive experience with microservices architecture, REST APIs, and enterprise-grade applications.

q3.question: Are you open to relocation or remote roles?
q3.answer: Yes, I'm currently based in Deggendorf, Germany pursuing my MSc. I'm open to both remote and on-site opportunities across Germany and Europe. I'm available as a Werkstudent (20 hours/week) with immediate start.

q4.question: Can you work in team environments?
q4.answer: Absolutely. I have strong experience working in cross-functional teams across Africa, Asia, and Europe. I've led feature review demos across 4 continents and mentored junior developers, reducing onboarding time by 35%.

q5.question: How can I contact you quickly?
q5.answer: You can reach me via email at yogesh.mayocipom2001@gmail.com, phone at +49 176 68203472, or LinkedIn at linkedin.com/in/yogesh-m314ab8264. I typically respond within 24-48 hours.

work.title: Work & Projects
work.subtitle: 3+ years building production systems across telecom, healthcare & open source.

highlights: Built end-to-end CRM modules using React, Spring Boot, and Kubernetes for Vodacom Congo's VDRC platform, delivering the Customer 360 dashboard to over 1 million telecom subscribers.

Reduced JSON payload integration effort by 80% by implementing JOLT transformations that fully decoupled payload mapping from API specification changes, eliminating manual rework on every release cycle.
Developed a reusable React component library with i18n configuration-based labels, enabling multi-language deployments across 5 countries with zero code duplication.
Secured the entire platform using Keycloak RBAC, enforcing role-based and scope-based menu and feature access control for hundreds of agent and administrator users.
Owned the complete GitLab CI/CD pipeline: code review, release tagging, Docker image builds, and OpenShift deployments, standardising deployment runbooks and reducing release errors by 30%.
Integrated backend services with ESB, billing platforms, and 6 microservices including billing configuration, customer management, and financial approval workflows.

Led feature review demos with cross-functional implementation teams across 4 continents including Africa, Europe, and Asia, bridging cultural communication styles to align on technical deliverables and reduce requirement misunderstandings by 40%.

Navigated complex international client expectations by adapting documentation, demo pacing, and technical language for non-English-speaking stakeholders at Vodacom Congo, improving stakeholder sign-off speed by 2 sprint cycles.
Architected Jenkins CI/CD pipelines following AWS and Red Hat Kubernetes best practices, cutting deployment time by 40% and fully eliminating manual deployment steps across all environments.

Migrated over 500,000 medical records from Lotus Notes to cloud (LN2CLOUD project) with zero data loss, rebuilding the complete UI in Angular with reactive forms and role-based email approval workflows.
Resolved over 1,000 UAT defects across 25 Angular UI screens over multiple sprint cycles, directly improving release quality and earning client commendations on 3 consecutive project reviews.
Restored full CI pipeline stability after the Java 8 to Java 17 upgrade by owning the HP ALM module end-to-end, fixing critical test connection failures and rebuilding test-case loading logic.
Delivered Spring Boot REST APIs with clean layered service architecture supporting CRUD operations across a large enterprise codebase used by over 200 internal users.
Debugged complex API failures using Postman and server-side log analysis, systematically resolving all functional regressions introduced by the Java 17 migration within a 2-week sprint.

Mentored 4 junior developers on REST API design, code review standards, and debugging best practices, reducing their average onboarding time by 35% and increasing individual sprint completion rates from 60% to 85% within 2 months.

Initiated bi-weekly developer knowledge-sharing sessions across a 20-person engineering team, resulting in a 20% improvement in overall sprint delivery rate and 3 junior developers independently leading modules within 6 months.
Recognised with IBM Star of the Month award for measurable mentoring impact and cross-team knowledge transfer that directly accelerated project delivery timelines.

projectsList.title: Vodacom VDRC CRM
projectsList.description: Customer 360 dashboard for Vodacom Congo serving 1M+ telecom subscribers. Full backend-to-frontend system with microservice orchestration, Keycloak security, and multi-country i18n.

projectsList.title: Medical Records Migration - Horizon BCBSNJ
projectsList.description: Migrated 500,000+ medical records from Lotus Notes to cloud with zero data loss. Rebuilt the full UI in Angular with reactive forms, RBAC email approval workflows, and real-time audit trails.
projectsList.impact: 500K+ records · Zero data loss · 40% faster deployments

projectsList.title: Portfolio
projectsList.description: This portfolio a fully animated, dark/light-mode React SPA with GSAP scroll-driven reveals, Framer Motion spring transitions, custom cursor, preloader, and i18n. Every section built from scratch.
